title: The Supplier Qualification Process
alt: Four-step supplier qualification process under EU GMP and ICH Q9

items.label: Define & Classify by Risk
items.desc: Specify the need and assign a criticality tier per ICH Q9.

items.label: Assess the Supplier
items.desc: Questionnaires, documentation, certificates and risk-based audits.

items.label: Approve & Contract
items.desc: Quality sign-off plus a written quality agreement; add to ASL.

items.label: Monitor & Re-qualify
items.desc: Track performance and re-qualify on a risk basis.
